name: @metorial/planly
description: Schedule and auto-publish social media posts across Instagram, Facebook, Twitter/X, LinkedIn, Pinterest, TikTok, YouTube, Threads, Mastodon, and Bluesky. Manage teams, channels, and media files. Create schedule groups for coordinated multi-channel publishing. Upload and import media for use in posts. Generate AI-powered content from prompts. Configure platform-specific post options including stories, reels, threads, polls, privacy levels, and first comments. List Pinterest boards for scheduling. View and manage team members and ownership.
